mnemonics: Cournot's Duopoly Game: Cows Produce Cream
Imperfect Information: Keep Your Ear Open
keyPoints: Both firms have an inverse demand function Q = a - x_1 - x_2
Each firm produces and sells a product, and the market size is Q
Each firm has imperfect information: they don't know the other firm's production
Each firm maximizes its profit function: π = ax - cx^2
The firms choose their production levels (x_1, x_2) without knowing the other's choice
The Nash equilibrium is where each firm chooses its production level to maximize its profit
